task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the specific access review.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba web interface showing the 'Q3 2025 HR DB Access Review' opened or selected for editing.
The review item for 'alice.admin' is marked with a 'Keep' status (or equivalent UI toggle/dropdown indicating access is maintained).
The review item for 'bob.user' is marked with a 'Keep' status (or equivalent UI toggle/dropdown indicating access is maintained).
The review item for 'charlie.vendor' is marked with a 'Revoke' status (or equivalent UI toggle/dropdown indicating access is removed).

task_completion.description: Add the required comment for the revoked user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Contract ended' is entered into the comment, justification, or notes field specifically associated with the 'charlie.vendor' review item.

task_completion.description: Save and complete the access review.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicking a 'Save', 'Submit', or 'Complete' button, or a success message indicating the review updates have been saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eramba web interface to perform the review.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the Eramba application inside a web browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) to send API requests.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with actual form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Inputs and status changes are made within the Eramba UI elements (dropdowns, text boxes, toggles), not just typed into a separate text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL commands, sqlite3, or other database clients being used to update the review statuses directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Review Name: 'Q3 2025 HR DB Access Review'. Users to Keep: 'alice.admin' and 'bob.user'. User to Revoke: 'charlie.vendor'. Required Comment for Revocation: 'Contract ended' (case-insensitive).
